title: Episode I Adventures 8: Trouble on Tatooine
content:
{{Top|rwm|imp|italics=1}} {{Youmay|a [[Star Wars Legends|Legends]] young reader|''[[Trouble on Tatooine]]'', a [[canon]] young reader|linebreak=1}} {{Book |image=[[File:Adventures8.jpg]] |title=''Episode I Adventures 8:
Trouble on Tatooine'' |author=[[Dave Wolverton]] |cover artist= |illustrator= |editor= |publisher=[[Scholastic]] |early release= |release date=[[April]] [[2000]]''Episode I Adventures 8: Trouble on Tatooine'' |intl release= |rereleased= |media type=Paperback |pages=97 |isbn=043910145X |isbn2= |isbn3= |timeline=c. [[33 BBY/Legends|33 BBY]]''[[Episode I Adventures 5: The Ghostling Children]]'' tells a continuous story with the next three ''[[Star Wars: Episode I Adventures]]'' books, and {{FactFile|12|ANA 1-4|Anakin Skywalker}} states that Anakin Skywalker was between the ages of 5 and 9 during the events of the books, giving a range of [[37 BBY/Legends|37]]–[[33 BBY/Legends|33 BBY]] per ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''. ''The Ghostling Children'' also depicts Anakin as older than the eight-year-old Arawynne, putting the books in 33 BBY. |series=''[[Star Wars: Episode I Adventures]]'' |preceded by=[[Episode I Adventures 7: Capture Arawynne|Capture Arawynne]] |followed by=[[Episode I Adventures 9: Rescue in the Core|Rescue in the Core]] }} '''''Episode I Adventures 8: Trouble on Tatooine''''' was the eighth installment of ''[[Star Wars: Episode I Adventures]]''. {{Book-stub}} ==Publisher's summary== ''Anakin Skywalker and his friends are in big trouble. Slave hunters are after them. The fate of the Ghostling children rests in their hands. And they have only one chance to find freedom.'' ''Will they make it?'' ==Plot summary== {{Plot}} ==Media== {{Mediacat|from=1|imagecat=Images from Episode I Adventures 8: Trouble on Tatooine}} ===Cover gallery=== File:Adventures8.jpg|Novel cover File:Adventures8g.jpg|Game Book cover ==Appearances== {{App |characters= *[[Amee/Legends|Amee]] {{Mo}} *[[Arawynne]] *[[Kitster Chanchani Banai]] *[[Rakir Banai]] {{1st}} *[[Gardulla Besadii the Elder/Legends|Gardulla Besadii the Elder]] *[[Coniel]] {{1st}} *[[Dengula]] {{Mo}} *[[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]] {{Mo}} *[[Dorn (Bothan)|Dorn]] *[[Gondry]] *[[Jira/Legends|Jira]] *[[Pala Kwi'teksa]] *[[Matta]] {{Mo}} *[[Djas Puhr/Legends|Djas Puhr]] *[[Rimkar]] {{Mo}} *[[Sebulba/Legends|Sebulba]] *[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] *[[Shmi Skywalker Lars/Legends|Shmi Skywalker]] *[[Unidentified Morseerian pirates]] {{1st}} *[[Vansitt]] {{Mo}} *[[W.
